title: Agents
subtitle: Create a new Agent to route specific channels to a separate personality or workspace.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Create a new agent by name. You can optionally inherit the main agent's workspace bootstrap files.
createDialog.idInvalid: ID must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (not "main")
createDialog.inheritWorkspaceDescription: Copy SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, etc. from the main agent
createDialog.skillsDescription: Set commonly used skills for this agent (preference only).
createDialog.instructionsPlaceholder: Add persistent working preferences for this agent

importDialog.title: Import Agent
importDialog.description: Import an agent config from a local file or a remote URL.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from Ashan? This permanently deletes the agent and its Ashan-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: This list is read-only. Manage channel accounts and bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.channelsManagedInChannels: This agent is linked to channel types. Manage exact account bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from Ashan? This deletes the current channel configuration.
